url_placeholder: Paste a video, playlist, or channel link here...
cookies_help: Use only if content requires login. The file must exist on the same machine running VidPro.
confirm_cancel: Are you sure you want to cancel this job?
faq_a1: VidPro is powered by yt-dlp, which supports 1000+ sites. Preview is optimized for YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok.
faq_a2: Files are automatically organized into platform folders (YouTube, Instagram, TikTok). YouTube playlists and channels are also saved into a subfolder named after them.
faq_q3: How do I download audio only (MP3)?
faq_a3: Enable "Audio Only (MP3)" under Download Options to download as MP3.
faq_q4: How do I clip only part of a video?
faq_a4: Open "Advanced Settings" and enter the start and end timestamps (e.g., 00:01:00). This feature is currently supported for YouTube videos only.
faq_q5: How do I avoid downloading the same file again?
faq_a5: When "Skip Existing File" is enabled, already-downloaded files are detected and skipped. The UI will show a warning.
faq_q6: How do I clear job history?
faq_a6: On the Jobs page, use the Clear menu to remove completed, failed, or skipped items individually—or clear all history.
faq_q7: How do I track playlist downloads?
faq_a7: On the Jobs tab, click "Show videos" on a playlist or channel card to see every item, its order, and its current status.
faq_a8: By default, files are saved under /downloads in the project folder, organized into platform subfolders (YouTube, Instagram, TikTok).
faq_a9: You need Python 3.8+ and ffmpeg installed. ffmpeg is required to merge high-quality video and audio.
faq_a10: VidPro automatically extracts and encrypts browser cookies to handle age-restricted content. Simply log in to YouTube in your browser and VidPro will use your authenticated session.
faq_a11: Yes. All browser cookies are encrypted with AES-128 and stored locally. No data is transmitted to external servers. Temporary files are securely deleted after use.
faq_a12: Select your browser in "Cookies from Browser" dropdown. VidPro will extract cookies automatically, encrypt them, and cache them for 7 days to minimize security prompts.
faq_a13: VidPro includes comprehensive security: encrypted cookie storage, input validation, path traversal protection, CORS restrictions, and secure error handling.
faq_q14: How do I use the Chrome extension?
faq_a14: Install the VidPro extension from the chrome-extension/ folder. It detects videos on current pages and sends them to VidPro with one click.
faq_q15: Can I use manual cookies files?
faq_a15: Yes. You can upload a cookies.txt file in the Advanced Settings section. The file will be validated and used for authentication.
hero_subtitle: Download from YouTube and thousands of other supported sites in MP4, MP3 and more formats. Fast, secure and free.
hero_sites_more: Download unlimited videos from 1000+ more sites
